name: Ecommerce Hexagonal Architecture Team
description: Builds ecommerce application using hexagonal architecture pattern

hexagon.role: Domain & Application Logic Developer - Creates business logic, use cases, domain entities

ports.role: Port Interface Architect - Defines contracts between hexagon and adapters

adapters.role: Adapter Implementation Engineer - Implements ports with real technology

infra.role: Infrastructure & Configuration Specialist - Provides configuration, database, logging, and monitoring

frontend.role: Frontend Developer - Builds SvelteKit web application and UI components
